name: AI in America: OpenAI's Economic Blueprint
description: OpenAI's January 2025 economic blueprint document outlining policy positions and proposed frameworks for US AI development, deployment, and economic impact. Covers compute infrastructure, workforce, regulation, and competitive positioning.
relationToCloudSecurity: AI infrastructure is overwhelmingly cloud-hosted; policy positions on AI development have cloud-platform implications.
relationToAISecurity: Policy-oriented rather than technical-security-oriented. Useful context for AI governance discussions.

license.notes: OpenAI publications subject to OpenAI Terms of Use. Excerpts and citations generally permitted.

lifecycle.notes: Position paper; not a control framework.

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from source PDF via the marker pipeline.

notes: Policy document from a major AI vendor.
